verdict: Awareness campaign is burning cash heading into peak AC season; switch objective to leads before summer demand peaks.
diagnosis: Cost per lead hit roughly $374 over 28 days — more than double the $149 non-branded HVAC benchmark — because the campaign is set to awareness, not bookings.

signals.headline: Cost per lead near $374 this period
signals.detail: Nine leads from $3,369 in spend. Industry benchmark is around $149 for non-branded HVAC search.

signals.headline: Zero revenue tracked from 9 leads
signals.detail: Open opportunities show $0 monetary value. Either deals are unworked, untracked, or the leads are low-intent awareness clicks.

signals.headline: Frequency at 1.11 across 88,590 reach
signals.detail: Same people seeing the ad barely more than once. Awareness objective is spreading impressions thin instead of converting warm prospects.

signals.headline: Google Profile pulled 31 calls, 48 directions
signals.detail: Free local presence outproduced paid leads for direct contact. The 5-star rating across 150 reviews is your strongest asset.

signals.headline: Only 5 Instagram profile visits this period
signals.detail: Paid impressions are not driving brand discovery. The awareness campaign is not building an organic audience either.

benchmark.label: BENCHMARK
benchmark.subheader: HVAC cost per lead sits near $149
benchmark.body: Non-branded HVAC search leads averaged $149 in early 2026. Your $374 cost per lead this period runs roughly 2.5x that benchmark. Local Services Ads typically deliver leads at $25 to $75.

seasonal.label: SEASONAL
seasonal.subheader: Summer cooling demand is peaking now
seasonal.body: HVAC click costs spike in summer as cooling searches surge. AC repair searches convert hardest in June and July. Awareness spend works better in shoulder months, not when homeowners are actively buying.

competitor.label: COMPETITOR
competitor.subheader: Speed-to-lead is the industry weak spot
competitor.body: Only 17% of HVAC businesses respond to leads within an hour — the slowest of any trade. Fast responders close jobs at much higher rates. This is a winnable gap for you.

recommendations.title: Switch campaign objective from awareness to leads
recommendations.detail: Consider changing the Summer campaign goal to lead generation or conversions. Awareness optimizes for cheap impressions, not phone calls. Same budget should produce more booked jobs at lower cost per lead.

recommendations.title: Test Google Local Services Ads alongside Meta
recommendations.detail: Worth exploring LSAs given your 5-star rating across 150 reviews. Industry data shows $25 to $75 per lead on that channel — potentially one-fifth your current cost.

recommendations.title: Tighten lead response time to under one hour
recommendations.detail: Only 17% of HVAC businesses respond within the hour. With 9 paid leads sitting at $0 revenue, faster follow-up could be the biggest lever before increasing spend.
